rationale.fidelity: Retains the at-most-200 subset decision, pre-review information, latent violation status, review mechanism, online unreviewed items, and expected-prevented-harm objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes scarcity, prioritization, stakes, and imperfect ranking concrete, though the counterfactual allocation and detailed operational implications are compressed.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels calibration as an assumption and rejects perfect status knowledge; the evidentiary limits of expected-harm estimates could be stated more fully.
rationale.overall: A strong compact framing of scarce review attention with no hidden-information or perfect-ranking error.
